final:
module power_gating (
    input [1:0] status,
    output reg control
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (status == 2'b00) 
            control = 1'b0; // both components off
        else 
            control = 1'b1; // at least one component on
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      control = ~status;
    end
  end

endmodule
